case_title: JOHN HERSHEY VS. LEONARD WOHADLO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATORY RELIEF, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERSHEY, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT WOHADLO, LEONARD WOHDALO, MARGOT DOES 1-10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-06-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-30-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-21-2002
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WOHADLO, LEONARD WOHDALO, MARGOT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH PRO TEM OR AVAILABLE JUDGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERSHEY, JOHN
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-10-2002 AT 4:15 PM IN DEPT. 611

JUDGE DIANE WICK, CLERK-BETH WILBER: REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-10-2002 - FAX BY PLAINTIFF INFORMING THE CASE WAS GOING TO PRIVATE MEDIATION; PLAINTIFF WAS INFORMED THE CASE WOULD REMAIN ON THE TRIAL CALENDAR UNTIL SETTLEMENT WAS CONFIRMED WITH THE COURT, THEN IT WOULD BE SET ON THE CRC CALENDAR UNTIL A DISMISSAL WAS FILED.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF STIPULATED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERSHEY, JOHN
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERSHEY, JOHN ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT WOHADLO, LEONARD WOHDALO, MARGOT
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERSHEY, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOHADLO, LEONARD WOHDALO, MARGOT SEE JUDGMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-06-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
